title: ecbolium punduanum
intro: Ecbolium punduanum is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ecbolium punduanum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, Ecbolium punduanum is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it may also be used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
